steps.expression: (() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); if (!root) return false; const text = root.innerText || root.textContent || ''; const rows = root.querySelectorAll('tbody tr').length; return rows > 0 && !text.includes('Refreshing authored runtime'); })()

(() => { const labels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview th')).map((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim()); return labels.includes('Country') && labels.includes('Actions'); })()

(() => { const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview tbody tr')); const targetRow = rows.find((row) => /(^|\s)GB(\s|$)/.test((row.innerText || row.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' '))); if (!targetRow) { throw new Error('No GB runtime preview row found for location drill.'); } const button = Array.from(targetRow.querySelectorAll('.forge-dashboard-row-action')).find((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').includes('Drill to Region')); if (!button) { throw new Error('No Drill to Region action found on the GB runtime preview row.'); } button.click(); })()

Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-refinement-chip')).some((node) => { const text = (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim(); const value = (text.split('=')[1] || '').trim(); return text.includes('Drill to Region =') && value.length > 0; })

(() => { const labels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview th')).map((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim()); return labels.includes('Region') && !labels.includes('Country'); })()

(() => { const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview tbody tr')); const targetRow = rows.find((row) => (row.innerText || row.textContent || '').includes('GB-HEF')); if (!targetRow) { throw new Error('No GB-HEF runtime preview row found for metro drill.'); } const button = Array.from(targetRow.querySelectorAll('.forge-dashboard-row-action')).find((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').includes('Drill to Metro Code')); if (!button) { throw new Error('No Drill to Metro Code action found on the GB-HEF runtime preview row.'); } button.click(); })()

Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-refinement-chip')).some((node) => { const text = (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim(); const value = (text.split('=')[1] || '').trim(); return text.includes('Drill to Metro Code =') && value.length > 0; })

(() => { const labels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview th')).map((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim()); return labels.includes('Metro Code') && !labels.includes('Region'); })()
